title: NOLANI
summary: Nolani Detox Shampoo product visualization — pump bottle, moisture repair line art, and sculptural ribbon styling for an all-hair-types haircare launch.
problem: Deliver a hero packshot that reads premium haircare: believable matte bottle and pump hardware, crisp Nolani wordmark, and fluid set dressing without a physical product on set.
approach: Matched bottle proportions and label hierarchy from reference, built pump assembly and matte bottle materials in Blender, art-directed ribbon backdrops for colorway explorations, then lit with soft key and rim for beauty and variant passes.
outcome: Final beauty render and supporting colorway angles packaged for product visualization portfolio and client pitch use.

process.caption: Reference board for pump bottle silhouette, Nolani branding, and haircare line layout.
Bottle proportions, pump assembly, and ribbon backdrop blocked in 3D.
